rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE TESTAMENTARY TRUST ESTABLISHED FOR HAROLD JEROME HAYNIE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Petition For Successor Trustee
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. No petition for appointment of successor trustee has been filed. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WAYNE ANDERSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Under Ccp Section 473b To Set Aside Order For Final Distribution And For Order For Partial Return Of Distributions To Heirs Of Predeceased Spouse
rulings.Rulings: This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Ross C. Moody. Petitioners' Motion Under C.C.P. section 473B to Set Aside Order for Final Distribution and For Order for Partial Return of Distributions to Heirs of Predeceased Spouse is CONTINUED to November 13, 2024 at 2:00 p.m. in Department 204, on the Court's own motion. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on the day before the hearing. To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765 and passcode 514879. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765# and passcode 514879#. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JAMES D. BANKS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/23/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) The wrong form of notice was served. (2) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (3) No proof of publication has been filed. (4) Item 2b(1) of the petition should not be checked if 2b(3) applies. (5) Item 3g(1) of the petition should not be completed if there is no will. (6) An oral declination is not sufficient. If a person with priority (the decedent's sister or the Public Administrator) has not declined in writing (or nominated the petitioner), the petitioner does not have standing. [Probate Code Section 8461.] (7) The Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code Section 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially with a cover sheet. (8) Bond will be required unless the heir waives bond. Deadline is 9/13/24 for providing the assigned examiner a proposed order and courtesy copies of the petition and any other papers filed to address these issues. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
